v1.1 M2 violation: paragraph contains 8 distinct sentences (S1: 'The Procedures domain is based...'; S2: 'The extent...'; S3: 'Regardless...'; S4: 'The protocol design...'; S5: 'Measurements obtained...'; S6: 'For example, a biopsy...'; S7: 'In this case...'; S8: 'Describing the relationship...') merged into 1 SENTENCE atom. Should have been split into 8 SENTENCE atoms with sequential atom_index. Verbatim content itself is char-for-char correct including R10 'collected.Measurements' no-space PDF artifact preservation. HIGH-impact for atom-granularity downstream matching/retrieval.
